mapper.select: SELECT B.BUY_NUM , BUY_PRICE , BUY_DATE , BUY_CNT , BOOK_TITLE , BOOK_PRICE , UPLOAD_FILE_NAME FROM SHOP_BUY B INNER JOIN BUY_DETAIL D ON B.BUY_NUM = D.BUY_NUM INNER JOIN SHOP_BOOK BOOK ON D.BOOK_NUM = BOOK.BOOK_NUM INNER JOIN BOOK_IMG I ON I.BOOK_NUM = BOOK.BOOK_NUM WHERE IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND MEM_EMAIL = #{memEmail} ORDER BY BUY_DATE DESC

SELECT ( SELECT COUNT(BUY_NUM) FROM SHOP_BUY WHERE DATE(BUY_DATE) = CURRENT_DATE() ) AS saleCntToday, ( SELECT COUNT(BUY_NUM) FROM SHOP_BUY WHERE DATE(BUY_DATE) BETWEEN CONCAT(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE(), 'YYYY-MM'), '-01') AND CURRENT_DATE() ) AS saleCntMonth, ( SELECT NVL(SUM(BUY_PRICE), 0) FROM SHOP_BUY WHERE DATE(BUY_DATE) = CURRENT_DATE() ) AS saleToday, ( SELECT NVL(SUM(BUY_PRICE), 0) FROM SHOP_BUY WHERE DATE(BUY_DATE) BETWEEN CONCAT(TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE(), 'YYYY-MM'), '-01') AND CURRENT_DATE() ) AS saleMonth
SELECT MEM_EMAIL , COUNT(BUY_NUM) SALE_CNT_PER_MEMBER , SUM(BUY_PRICE) SALE_PER_MEMBER FROM SHOP_BUY GROUP BY MEM_EMAIL ORDER BY SALE_PER_MEMBER DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT D.BOOK_NUM, SUM(BUY_CNT) TOTAL_BUY_CNT, BOOK_TITLE, AUTHOR FROM BUY_DETAIL D, SHOP_BOOK B WHERE D.BOOK_NUM = B.BOOK_NUM GROUP BY D.BOOK_NUM ORDER BY TOTAL_BUY_CNT DESC, BOOK_TITLE ASC LIMIT 5

select.foreach: SELECT ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{day}) AS day , (SELECT NVL(SUM(BUY_PRICE), 0) FROM SHOP_BUY WHERE DATE(BUY_DATE) = ADDDATE(CURRENT_DATE(), -#{day})) AS sale
